story_angle: investigative exposé uncovering a hidden scandal
headline: Polio Vaccine Declared Safe After Nationwide Trials
deck: Dr. Salk's breakthrough is here. Parents are eagerly awaiting their turn.
article:
Records from the Central Bureau confirm the polio vaccine has been declared safe following extensive nationwide trials. The report cites forty-three independent witnesses.

Dr. Eliza Marsh shared insights with this paper, highlighting the underlying tensions that have persisted despite official assurances. 'We mapped this possibility in 1942,' they stated. 'No one wanted the map.'

In the docklands, residents described a sound reminiscent of silk tearing. One shopkeeper chose to tally the incident in terms of inventory losses rather than accolades.

The Ministry of Continuity issued a lengthy statement that failed to address key questions while introducing four new ones.

Tomorrow's edition will explore the financial aspects, underlying motives, and the crucial detail that every spokesperson has carefully sidestepped.
author: Foreign Bureau

oped.title: Why Every American Family Needs a Bomb Shelter
oped.author: A Concerned Father
oped.body: It is not paranoia. It is prudence. When the sirens sound, you will not have time to dig. You will have time to thank yourself.

classifieds.text: Luxurious atomic-powered villas available in New Rome! Experience modern living with our state-of-the-art atomic energy systems. Amenities include high-efficiency heating, radiant lighting, and access to the finest Roman gardens. Contact Lucius at 555-0199 for a private tour today!

Join the ranks of the Atomic Legion! Seeking skilled engineers and technicians to support our atomic research programs. Be part of the frontier of science while upholding the glory of Rome. Excellent pay and benefits. Inquire at the Forum of the Sciences, Mondays and Wednesdays.

Revolutionize your commute with a new atomic-powered chariot! Sleek design, environmentally friendly, and equipped with the latest in navigational technology. Available in various colors! Visit the Automotive Emporium in the heart of the Forum to test drive the future.

Enroll your young citizens in the Academy of Atomic Studies! Courses available in nuclear physics, atomic agriculture, and energy management. Prepare the next generation for a brighter, radiant tomorrow. Sign up now for a free introductory seminar this Saturday at the Colosseum!

panels.caption: Did you hear about the polio vaccine being declared safe?
I prefer timelines where that sort of thing is impossible.

joke.setup: How do you report on today's headline?
joke.punchline: Very carefully, in an alternate timeline.
joke.text: How do you report on today's headline? Very carefully, in an alternate timeline.
